question:
Cargo tanks ____.
1) are large drums temporarily attached to a vehicle
2) are tanks that the military uses to transport hazardous materials
3) are large drums used to contain hazmat that is loaded on a trailer
4) are bulk packagings permanently attached to a vehicle
canonical_answer: are bulk packagings permanently attached to a vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: are bulk packagings permanently attached to a vehicle

appears_in.answer: are bulk packagings permanently attached to a vehicle
